projectDescription: A community-curated, alphabetically-organized list of 1600+ developer portfolio websites for inspiration, with automation scripts for maintenance and a machine-readable feed.json export.
keyFeatures: 1600+ curated developer portfolio links organized alphabetically
Contributor-friendly: open pull requests to add your portfolio
Machine-readable feed.json export of all portfolio entries
Automated alphabetical sorting and deduplication via Python scripts
Optional taglines/expertise labels for each portfolio entry
publicApiSurface: feed.json — structured JSON list of all portfolios (name, url, tagline)
python src/alphabetical.py — sort, deduplicate, and normalize README.md
python src/generate_feed.py — regenerate feed.json from README.md
python run_tests.py — run the test suite
extract_portfolio_data(lines) — parse portfolio entries from README lines
create_feed_json(readme_path, output_path) — write feed.json from README
